Saskatchewan RCMP Release

Date: 2024-01-15

Location: Saskatoon, SK

Public Safety Notice

The Saskatchewan RCMP is seeking public assistance in locating a missing person.

Details

  • Name: John Smith
  • Age: 42
  • Last Seen: January 15, 2024, near downtown Saskatoon
  • Description: Male, approximately 6 feet tall, brown hair
  • Circumstances: Missing since morning, considered out of character

Action Requested

If you have any information regarding this missing person, please contact:

  • Local RCMP: (306) 555-0100
  • Emergency: 911

This is a sanitized example fixture for testing purposes.
